ruleContent.content:
<js>
try{
form=java.getElement("#content label")
txt=java.getElement("#content [class=001] p")
while (form!=""){
	code=String(java.getString("strong@textNodes",form)).trim()
	java.log(code)
	result=java.ajax(`${baseUrl},{"body":"captcha=${code}","method":"POST"}`)
	java.setContent(result)
	form=java.getElement("#article form")
	}
b64=result.match(/atob\('([^']+)'\)/)[1]
if(result.match(/'aes'\s*===\s*'aes'/)){
	key=result.match(/CryptoJS\.enc\.Base64\.parse\('([^']+)'\)/)[1]
	
	txt+=java.createSymmetricCrypto("AES/ECB/Pkcs7Padding", java.base64DecodeToByteArray(key)).decryptStr(b64)
	}else{
		txt+=java.base64Decode(b64)
		
		}
result=txt}catch{result="\n这章正文不存在！！！\n换一章！！！\n或者\n换本书！！！\n或者\n换源！！！"}
</js>

exploreUrl:
<js>
function setArgument(key, value) {
    var open_argument = source.getVariable();
    open_argument = getArguments(open_argument, '') || {};
    open_argument[key] = value;
    var result = JSON.stringify(open_argument);
    source.setVariable(result);
    return result;
}

var open_argument = source.getVariable();
var base_url = getArguments(open_argument, 'server') || '';
var ms = getArguments(open_argument, 'tone_id') || '';
var source_type = getArguments(open_argument, 'source_type') || '男频';
var tab = getArguments(open_argument, 'media') || '小说';
var sources = getArguments(open_argument, 'source') || '番茄';


var sdtoken;
try {
    var loginInfoMap = source.getLoginInfoMap ? source.getLoginInfoMap() : {};
    sdtoken = String(loginInfoMap['手动填写番茄token(可不填)'] || '');
} catch (e) {
    sdtoken = '';
}

var rawCookie = getFanqieCookie() || sdtoken;
var match = rawCookie.match(/sessionid=[^;]+/);
var fqcookie = match ? match[0] : '';
var fqssionid = '';
if (!fqcookie) {
    java.toast('您还未登陆番茄账号，无法同步数据哦！');
} else {
    fqssionid = getSessionId(fqcookie)
}
var fqsjurl = base_url + "/bookshelf?page={{page}}&ssionid=" + fqssionid;
var fqtjurl = base_url + "/fqrecommend?page={{page}}&ssionid=" + fqssionid;
var fqlsurl = base_url + "/fqhistory?page={{page}}&ssionid=" + fqssionid;

var groupDatas = [];
var infoData = [];

function deviceType() {
    try {
        return !!java.androidId();
    } catch (e) {
        return false;
    }
}

var hasValidCookie = fqcookie.length > 0;

if (hasValidCookie) {
    function groupQuery() {
        try {
            var url = base_url + "/group_name?ssionid=" + fqssionid;
            var res = java.ajax(url);
            var response = JSON.parse(res);

            if (!(response && response.data)) {}

            response.data.forEach(function(group) {
                var keys = Object.keys(group);
                if (keys.length > 0) {
                    var key = keys[0];
                    var value = group[key];
                    if (value && value.length) {
                        var option = {
                            "method": "POST",
                            "body": {
                                "book_ids": value,
                                "page": "{{page}}"
                            }
                        };
                        groupDatas.push({
                            title: key,
                            url: base_url + "/bookshelf," + JSON.stringify(option),
                            style: {
                                layout_flexGrow: 1,
                                layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                            }
                        });
                    }
                }
            });

            if (groupDatas.length % 2 !== 0) {
                groupDatas.push({
                    title: "--",
                    url: "",
                    style: {
                        layout_flexGrow: 1,
                        layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                    }
                });
            }
        } catch (e) {
            java.longToast("番茄登录过期，已隐藏番茄书架");
        }
    }

    try {
        java.longToast("正在加载分组数据...");
        var userUrl = base_url + "/fquser?ssionid=" + fqssionid;
        var userRes = java.ajax(userUrl);
        var userData = JSON.parse(userRes);

        var userName = (userData && userData.data && userData.data.name) ? userData.data.name : '未知用户';
        if (!userName.includes('未知用户')) {
            infoData = [{
                title: "番茄个人中心",
                url: fqsjurl,
                style: {
                    layout_flexGrow: 1,
                    layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                }
            }, {
                title: "个性推荐(番茄)",
                url: fqtjurl,
                style: {
                    layout_flexGrow: 1,
                    layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                }
            }, {
                title: "历史阅读(番茄)",
                url: fqlsurl,
                style: {
                    layout_flexGrow: 1,
                    layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                }
            }];
        }
        groupQuery();
    } catch (e) {
        java.longToast("番茄登录过期，已隐藏番茄书架");
    }
}

var style_list = [];
try {
    var durl = `${base_url}/discovestyle?source=${sources}&source_type=${source_type}&tab=${tab}`;
    var res = java.ajax(durl);
    var result = JSON.parse(res);
    style_list = result.data || [];
    if (result.msg) {
        java.toast(result.msg);
    }
} catch (e) {
    java.toast("发现样式获取失败");
}
let qtcookie = cookie.getCookie(base_url);
let qtop = {
    method: "GET",
    headers: {
        cookie: qtcookie
    },
};
qtop = JSON.stringify(qtop);
let qtsjurl = base_url+'/get_book_shelf,'+qtop
let qtsj = [{
                title: "大灰狼个人中心",
                url: qtsjurl,
                style: {
                    layout_flexGrow: 1,
                    layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                }
            }]
var finalData = infoData.concat(groupDatas, style_list);
finalData = qtsj.concat(finalData);
JSON.stringify(finalData);
</js>

    let res = JSON.parse(java.hexDecodeToString(result));
    let book_id = res.book_id;
    let tab = res.tab;
    let sources = res.sources;
    let url = res.url;
    let html = "";
    let proxy = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "proxy");
    if (url != "" && proxy == "本地") {

                "Cookie": ck69
            };

            html = java.ajax(url + ',' + op);
        } else {

        }

        }
    }
    let base_url = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "server");
    let op = {
        method: "POST",
        body: {
            html: html
        }
    };
    op = JSON.stringify(op);
    let varia = String(book.getVariable('custom'));
    if (varia == 'null') {
        varia = '';
    }

        'custom': varia
    });

ruleBookInfo.intro:
<js>
let {
    book_id,
    source: sources,
    tab,
    book_tts,
    tags,
    role,
    last_chapter_title,
    last_chapter_update_time,
    word_number,
    status,
    score,
    abstract,
    copyright_info
} = result;
let proxy = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "proxy");
if (proxy == "本地") {
    proxy = "本地网络";
} else {
    proxy = "服务器网络";
}
java.put("book_detail", JSON.stringify(result));
let base_url = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "server");
let key = "";
try {
    let cookieValue =
        String(cookie.getCookie(base_url)) || String(java.getCookie(base_url));
    key = getKey(cookieValue);
} catch (e) {
    key = "";
}

if (key == "") {
    java.log("当前服务器未查询到登录状态，尝试查询其他服务器登录状态...");
    let cookieValue;
    for (let h of host) {
        try {
            cookieValue = String(cookie.getCookie(h)) || String(java.getCookie(h));
            key = getKey(cookieValue);
        } catch (e) {
            key = "";
        }
        if (key) {
            java.log(`已在${h}登录，退出查询，正在转移登录状态到当前服务${base_url}`);
            //java.log(cookieValue)
            removeCookie(h);
            removeCookie(base_url);
            cookie.setCookie(base_url, cookieValue);
            break;
        }
    }
}

if (book.readConfig == null || book.readConfig.useReplaceRule == null) {
    book.setUseReplaceRule(false);
}

let nickname = '账号状态：⚠️ 未登录 | 点击右上角 🔖 登录';
try {
    let opcx = {
        method: "GET",
        headers: {
            cookie: 'qttoken=' + key + ';'
        },
    };
    opcx = JSON.stringify(opcx);
    let user_info = JSON.parse(java.ajax(base_url + '/get_avatar,' + opcx));
    if (user_info.code == 0) {
        if (user_info.nickname) {
            nickname = '欢迎回来：' + user_info.nickname
        } else {
            nickname = '欢迎回来：' + user_info.email + "(请前往用户后台设置用户名)"
        }
    }
} catch (e) {
    if (key) {
        nickname = '账号状态：已登录'
    }
};

let loginStatus = nickname;

let lightDivider = "❇️───────❇️───────❇️";
let heavyDivider = "‎\n‎";

let isValid = (value) => String(value).length > 1;
let ctitle = book.durChapterTitle || '未开始';
let info = `
    📡 当前服务：${base_url}
    🔑 ${loginStatus}
    🏷 数据来源：${sources}
    🔄 当前模式：${tab}
    ⚙️ 访问模式：${proxy}
    📖 阅读至：${ctitle}
`;

if (tab == "听书") {
    let toneId = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "tone_id");
    if (isValid(book_tts)) {
        info += `${lightDivider}
    🎵 音色配置：${toneId}
    ${book_tts}
`;
    }
}

let basicInfo = "";
let addBasicInfo = (value, prefix, icon) => {
    if (isValid(value)) basicInfo += `    ${icon} ${prefix} ${value}\n`;
};

addBasicInfo(tags, "书籍分类：", "🌈");
addBasicInfo(role, "书籍主角：", "👑");
addBasicInfo(last_chapter_title, "最新章节：", "📚");
addBasicInfo(last_chapter_update_time, "更新时间：", "⏳");
addBasicInfo(word_number, "书籍字数：", "📊");
addBasicInfo(status, "书籍状态：", "🚩");
addBasicInfo(score, "书籍评分：", "⭐");

if (basicInfo) info += `${lightDivider}\n${basicInfo}`;

if (isValid(abstract)) {
    let indentedAbstract = abstract
        .split("\n")
        .map((line) => `    ${line}`)
        .join("\n");
    info += `${heavyDivider}
    📖 书籍简介：
${indentedAbstract}
`;
} else {
    info += `${heavyDivider}`;
}

if (isValid(copyright_info)) {
    info += `${lightDivider}
    © ${copyright_info}
`;
} else {
    info += `${lightDivider}`;
}

info += `
${heavyDivider}
    💠💠💠 数据更新于 ${new Date().toLocaleString()} 💠💠💠
`;
let jjinfo = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "info");

if (jjinfo != "on") {
    info = String(info)
        .split("\n")
        .map((line) => line.replace(/^ {4}/, ""))
        .join("\n");
} else {
    basicInfo = "";
    addBasicInfo(last_chapter_title, "最新章节：", "📚");
    addBasicInfo(last_chapter_update_time, "更新时间：", "⏳");
    addBasicInfo(word_number, "书籍字数：", "📊");
    addBasicInfo(status, "书籍状态：", "🚩");
    addBasicInfo(score, "书籍评分：", "⭐");
    if (isValid(abstract)) {
        let indentedAbstract = abstract
            .split("\n")
            .map((line) => `    ${line}`)
            .join("\n");
        basicInfo += `
    \n‎
    📖 书籍简介：
${indentedAbstract}
`;
    } else {
        basicInfo += `${heavyDivider}`;
    }
    info = `‎\n🏷 数据来源：${sources}\n` + basicInfo;
}
</js>

        res.body
        .replace("source", "sources")
        .split("&")
        .map((query) => query.split("="))
    );

}

    if (sources == '69书吧') {
        let ck69 = String(cookie.getCookie(url));
        let headers = {
            "Cookie": ck69
        };
        let op = JSON.stringify({
            "headers": headers
        });
        html = java.ajax(url + ',' + op);
    } else {
        html = java.ajax(url);
    }
    //java.log(html);
    if (html.includes("Just a moment...") && sources == '69书吧') {
        cookie.removeCookie(url);
        var x = `https://www.69shuba.com`;
        java.longToast('需要真人验证，请进入任意书籍详情页过验证');
        var s = java.startBrowserAwait(x, "需要真人验证，请进入任意书籍详情页过验证").body();

        let ck69 = String(cookie.getCookie(url));
        let headers = {
            "Cookie": ck69
        };
        let op = JSON.stringify({
            "headers": headers
        });
        //java.log(op);
        html = java.ajax(url + ',' + op);
        //java.log(html);
    }
};
let base_url = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "server");
let op = {
    method: "POST",
    body: {
        html: html
    }
};
op = JSON.stringify(op);
let varia = String(book.getVariable('custom'));
if (varia == 'null') {
    varia = '';
}
varia = JSON.stringify({
    'custom': varia
});
// varia = java.base64Encode(varia);
//java.log(`${base_url}/catalog?book_id=${book_id}&source=${sources}&tab=${tab}&variable=${varia},${op}`);
let data = java.ajax(
    `${base_url}/catalog?book_id=${book_id}&source=${sources}&tab=${tab}&variable=${varia},${op}`
);
let device, device_type;
try {
    device = java.deviceID();
    device_type = "苹果";
} catch (e) {
    try {
        device = java.androidId();
        device_type = "安卓";
    } catch (e) {
        device = "";
        device_type = "安卓";
    }
}

if (tab == "小说") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 8;
    } else {
        book.type = 0;
    }
} else if (tab == "听书") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 32;
    } else {
        book.type = 1;
    }
} else if (tab == "漫画") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 64;
    } else {
        book.type = 2;
    }
} else if (tab == "短剧") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 8;
    } else {
        book.type = 3;
    }
} else {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 8;
    } else {
        book.type = 0;
    }
}
let qtcookie = cookie.getCookie(base_url);
let reading = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "reading");

if (book && book.order != 0 && reading == '1') {
    try {
        if (!data || !book.variable || !base_url || !qtcookie) {
            java.log('缺少必要参数');
        } else {
            let parsedData;
            try {
                parsedData = JSON.parse(data);
            } catch (e) {
                java.log('解析data数据失败:' + e);
            }
            
            if (parsedData && parsedData.data && Array.isArray(parsedData.data) && parsedData.data[book.durChapterIndex]) {
                let ritem = parsedData.data[book.durChapterIndex];
                let bookInfoObj;
                try {
                    bookInfoObj = JSON.parse(book.variable);
                } catch (e) {
                    java.log('解析book.variable失败:' + e);
                }
                
                if (bookInfoObj) {
                    let book_info;
                    try {
                        book_info = JSON.parse(bookInfoObj.book_detail || JSON.stringify(bookInfoObj));
                    } catch (e) {
                        java.log('解析book_detail失败:' + e);
                    }
                    
                    if (book_info && typeof book_info === 'object') {
                        let rurl = base_url + '/add_book_to_book_shelf,';
                        book_info['read_status'] = 1;
                        book_info['last_chapter_item_id'] = ritem.item_id || '';
                        book_info['last_chapter_title'] = ritem.title || '';
                        let rop = {
                            method: "POST",
                            headers: {
                                cookie: qtcookie
                            },
                            body: book_info
                        };
                        let check_book_url = base_url + '/check_book_in_book_shelf,';
                        let checkResponse;
                        
                        try {
                            checkResponse = java.ajax(check_book_url + JSON.stringify(rop));
                        } catch (e) {
                            java.log('检查书籍请求失败:' + e);
                        }
                        
                        if (checkResponse) {
                            let check_data;
                            try {
                                check_data = JSON.parse(checkResponse).data;
                            } catch (e) {
                                java.log('解析检查响应失败:' + e);
                            }
                            try {
                                if (check_data && check_data.id) {
                                    book_info['id'] = check_data.id;
                                    let uurl = base_url + '/update_book_shelf,';
                                    java.ajax(uurl + JSON.stringify(rop));
                                } else {
                                    java.ajax(rurl + JSON.stringify(rop));
                                }
                            } catch (e) {
                                java.log('书架操作失败:' + e);
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    } catch (error) {
        java.log('书籍同步流程异常:' + error);
        java.longToast('\n同步阅读进度失败，但不影响阅读，可以前往登录关闭书架同步功能。');
    }
}
data;
</js>$.data

if (String(key).startsWith("m:") || String(key).startsWith("m：")) {
    media = "漫画"

} else if (String(key).startsWith("t:") || String(key).startsWith("t：")) {
    media = "听书"

} else if (String(key).startsWith("d:") || String(key).startsWith("d：")) {
    media = "短剧"
    key = key.slice(2)
} else if (String(key).startsWith("x:") || String(key).startsWith("x：")) {
    media = "小说"
    key = key.slice(2)
} else {
    media = getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'media');
}
if (key.includes('@')) {
    var parts = key.split('@');
    key = parts[0];
    sources = parts[1] || sources;
}
let qtcookie = cookie.getCookie(base_url);
let op = {
    method: "GET",
    headers: {
        cookie: qtcookie
    },
};
op = JSON.stringify(op);
`${base_url}/search?title=${key}&tab=${media}&source=${sources}&page={{page}}&disabled_sources=${disabled_sources},${op}`
</js>

.replace(/\[|。/,'')
.replace(/第([零一二两三四五六七八九十百千]+)章/g,java.toNumChapter(result))

ruleContent.content:
<js>
var type = java.get("type");
var item_id = java.hexDecodeToString(result);

if (type == '3') {
    url = getHost() + '/content?book_id=' + java.get('book_id') + '&item_id=' + item_id + '&tab=小说&source=番茄'; 
    var response = java.ajax(url);
    var json = JSON.parse(response);
    if (json.success && json.data && json.data.length > 0) {
        result = json.data[0].content;
    } else {
        result = '【加载失败】未获取到内容数据';
    }
}
if (type == '2') {
    try {
        var value = JSON.parse(source.getVariable());
        var tone = value.tone;
    } catch (error) {
        var tone = "";
    }
    url = getHost() + '/content?book_id=' + java.get('book_id') + '&item_id=' + item_id + '&tab=有声&source=番茄' + (tone ? '&' + tone : '');
    var response = java.ajax(url);
    var json = JSON.parse(response);
    if (json.success && json.data && json.data.length > 0) {
        result = json.data[0].content;
    } else {
        result = '【加载失败】未获取到音频数据';
    }
}
if (type == '8') {
    url = getHost() + '/content?book_id=' + java.get('book_id') + '&item_id=' + item_id + '&tab=漫画&source=番茄'; 
    var response = java.ajax(url);
    var json = JSON.parse(response);
    if (json.success && json.data && json.data.length > 0) {
        result = json.data[0].content;
    } else {
        result = '【加载失败】未获取到内容数据';
    }
}
if (type == '11') {
    url = getHost() + '/content?book_id=' + java.get('book_id') + '&tab=视频&source=番茄&player=y'; 
    java.log(url);
    java.startBrowser(url, "");
    result = `【刷新正文】播放`
}
</js>

exploreUrl:
<js>
function setArgument(key, value) {
    var open_argument = source.getVariable();
    open_argument = getArguments(open_argument, '') || {};
    open_argument[key] = value;
    var result = JSON.stringify(open_argument);
    source.setVariable(result);
    return result;
}

var open_argument = source.getVariable();
var base_url = getArguments(open_argument, 'server') || '';
var ms = getArguments(open_argument, 'tone_id') || '';
var source_type = getArguments(open_argument, 'source_type') || '男频';
var tab = getArguments(open_argument, 'media') || '小说';
var sources = getArguments(open_argument, 'source') || '番茄';


var sdtoken;
try {
    var loginInfoMap = source.getLoginInfoMap ? source.getLoginInfoMap() : {};
    sdtoken = String(loginInfoMap['手动填写番茄token(可不填)'] || '');
} catch (e) {
    sdtoken = '';
}

var rawCookie = getFanqieCookie() || sdtoken;
var match = rawCookie.match(/sessionid=[^;]+/);
var fqcookie = match ? match[0] : '';
var fqssionid = '';
if (!fqcookie) {
    java.toast('您还未登陆番茄账号，无法同步数据哦！');
} else {
    fqssionid = getSessionId(fqcookie)
}
var fqsjurl = base_url + "/bookshelf?page={{page}}&ssionid=" + fqssionid;
var fqtjurl = base_url + "/fqrecommend?page={{page}}&ssionid=" + fqssionid;
var fqlsurl = base_url + "/fqhistory?page={{page}}&ssionid=" + fqssionid;

var groupDatas = [];
var infoData = [];

function deviceType() {
    try {
        return !!java.androidId();
    } catch (e) {
        return false;
    }
}

var hasValidCookie = fqcookie.length > 0;

if (hasValidCookie) {
    function groupQuery() {
        try {
            var url = base_url + "/group_name?ssionid=" + fqssionid;
            var res = java.ajax(url);
            var response = JSON.parse(res);

            if (!(response && response.data)) {}

            response.data.forEach(function(group) {
                var keys = Object.keys(group);
                if (keys.length > 0) {
                    var key = keys[0];
                    var value = group[key];
                    if (value && value.length) {
                        var option = {
                            "method": "POST",
                            "body": {
                                "book_ids": value,
                                "page": "{{page}}"
                            }
                        };
                        groupDatas.push({
                            title: key,
                            url: base_url + "/bookshelf," + JSON.stringify(option),
                            style: {
                                layout_flexGrow: 1,
                                layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                            }
                        });
                    }
                }
            });

            if (groupDatas.length % 2 !== 0) {
                groupDatas.push({
                    title: "--",
                    url: "",
                    style: {
                        layout_flexGrow: 1,
                        layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                    }
                });
            }
        } catch (e) {
            java.longToast("番茄登录过期，已隐藏番茄书架");
        }
    }

    try {
        java.longToast("正在加载分组数据...");
        var userUrl = base_url + "/fquser?ssionid=" + fqssionid;
        var userRes = java.ajax(userUrl);
        var userData = JSON.parse(userRes);

        var userName = (userData && userData.data && userData.data.name) ? userData.data.name : '未知用户';
        if (!userName.includes('未知用户')) {
            infoData = [{
                title: "番茄个人中心",
                url: fqsjurl,
                style: {
                    layout_flexGrow: 1,
                    layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                }
            }, {
                title: "个性推荐(番茄)",
                url: fqtjurl,
                style: {
                    layout_flexGrow: 1,
                    layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                }
            }, {
                title: "历史阅读(番茄)",
                url: fqlsurl,
                style: {
                    layout_flexGrow: 1,
                    layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                }
            }];
        }
        groupQuery();
    } catch (e) {
        java.longToast("番茄登录过期，已隐藏番茄书架");
    }
}

var style_list = [];
try {
    var durl = `${base_url}/discovestyle?source=${sources}&source_type=${source_type}&tab=${tab}`;
    var res = java.ajax(durl);
    var result = JSON.parse(res);
    style_list = result.data || [];
    if (result.msg) {
        java.toast(result.msg);
    }
} catch (e) {
    java.toast("发现样式获取失败");
}
let qtcookie = cookie.getCookie(base_url);
let qtop = {
    method: "GET",
    headers: {
        cookie: qtcookie
    },
};
qtop = JSON.stringify(qtop);
let qtsjurl = base_url+'/get_book_shelf,'+qtop
let qtsj = [{
                title: "大灰狼个人中心",
                url: qtsjurl,
                style: {
                    layout_flexGrow: 1,
                    layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                }
            }]
var finalData = infoData.concat(groupDatas, style_list);
finalData = qtsj.concat(finalData);
JSON.stringify(finalData);
</js>

ruleBookInfo.intro:
<js>
let {
    book_id,
    source: sources,
    tab,
    book_tts,
    tags,
    role,
    last_chapter_title,
    last_chapter_update_time,
    word_number,
    status,
    score,
    abstract,
    copyright_info
} = result;
let proxy = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "proxy");
if (proxy == "本地") {
    proxy = "本地网络";
} else {
    proxy = "服务器网络";
}
java.put("book_detail", JSON.stringify(result));
let base_url = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "server");
let key = "";
try {
    let cookieValue =
        String(cookie.getCookie(base_url)) || String(java.getCookie(base_url));
    key = getKey(cookieValue);
} catch (e) {
    key = "";
}

if (key == "") {
    java.log("当前服务器未查询到登录状态，尝试查询其他服务器登录状态...");
    let cookieValue;
    for (let h of host) {
        try {
            cookieValue = String(cookie.getCookie(h)) || String(java.getCookie(h));
            key = getKey(cookieValue);
        } catch (e) {
            key = "";
        }
        if (key) {
            java.log(`已在${h}登录，退出查询，正在转移登录状态到当前服务${base_url}`);
            //java.log(cookieValue)
            removeCookie(h);
            removeCookie(base_url);
            cookie.setCookie(base_url, cookieValue);
            break;
        }
    }
}

if (book.readConfig == null || book.readConfig.useReplaceRule == null) {
    book.setUseReplaceRule(false);
}

let nickname = '账号状态：⚠️ 未登录 | 点击右上角 🔖 登录';
try {
    let opcx = {
        method: "GET",
        headers: {
            cookie: 'qttoken=' + key + ';'
        },
    };
    opcx = JSON.stringify(opcx);
    let user_info = JSON.parse(java.ajax(base_url + '/get_avatar,' + opcx));
    if (user_info.code == 0) {
        if (user_info.nickname) {
            nickname = '欢迎回来：' + user_info.nickname
        } else {
            nickname = '欢迎回来：' + user_info.email + "(请前往用户后台设置用户名)"
        }
    }
} catch (e) {
    if (key) {
        nickname = '账号状态：已登录'
    }
};

let loginStatus = nickname;

let lightDivider = "❇️───────❇️───────❇️";
let heavyDivider = "‎\n‎";

let isValid = (value) => String(value).length > 1;
let ctitle = book.durChapterTitle || '未开始';
let info = `
    📡 当前服务：${base_url}
    🔑 ${loginStatus}
    🏷 数据来源：${sources}
    🔄 当前模式：${tab}
    ⚙️ 访问模式：${proxy}
    📖 阅读至：${ctitle}
`;

if (tab == "听书") {
    let toneId = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "tone_id");
    if (isValid(book_tts)) {
        info += `${lightDivider}
    🎵 音色配置：${toneId}
    ${book_tts}
`;
    }
}

let basicInfo = "";
let addBasicInfo = (value, prefix, icon) => {
    if (isValid(value)) basicInfo += `    ${icon} ${prefix} ${value}\n`;
};

addBasicInfo(tags, "书籍分类：", "🌈");
addBasicInfo(role, "书籍主角：", "👑");
addBasicInfo(last_chapter_title, "最新章节：", "📚");
addBasicInfo(last_chapter_update_time, "更新时间：", "⏳");
addBasicInfo(word_number, "书籍字数：", "📊");
addBasicInfo(status, "书籍状态：", "🚩");
addBasicInfo(score, "书籍评分：", "⭐");

if (basicInfo) info += `${lightDivider}\n${basicInfo}`;

if (isValid(abstract)) {
    let indentedAbstract = abstract
        .split("\n")
        .map((line) => `    ${line}`)
        .join("\n");
    info += `${heavyDivider}
    📖 书籍简介：
${indentedAbstract}
`;
} else {
    info += `${heavyDivider}`;
}

if (isValid(copyright_info)) {
    info += `${lightDivider}
    © ${copyright_info}
`;
} else {
    info += `${lightDivider}`;
}

info += `
${heavyDivider}
    💠💠💠 数据更新于 ${new Date().toLocaleString()} 💠💠💠
`;
let jjinfo = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "info");

if (jjinfo != "on") {
    info = String(info)
        .split("\n")
        .map((line) => line.replace(/^ {4}/, ""))
        .join("\n");
} else {
    basicInfo = "";
    addBasicInfo(last_chapter_title, "最新章节：", "📚");
    addBasicInfo(last_chapter_update_time, "更新时间：", "⏳");
    addBasicInfo(word_number, "书籍字数：", "📊");
    addBasicInfo(status, "书籍状态：", "🚩");
    addBasicInfo(score, "书籍评分：", "⭐");
    if (isValid(abstract)) {
        let indentedAbstract = abstract
            .split("\n")
            .map((line) => `    ${line}`)
            .join("\n");
        basicInfo += `
    \n‎
    📖 书籍简介：
${indentedAbstract}
`;
    } else {
        basicInfo += `${heavyDivider}`;
    }
    info = `‎\n🏷 数据来源：${sources}\n` + basicInfo;
}
</js>

}

        var x = `https://www.69shuba.com`;

        };
        let op = JSON.stringify({
            "headers": headers
        });
        //java.log(op);
        html = java.ajax(url + ',' + op);
        //java.log(html);
    }
};
let base_url = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "server");
let op = {
    method: "POST",
    body: {
        html: html
    }
};
op = JSON.stringify(op);
let varia = String(book.getVariable('custom'));
if (varia == 'null') {
    varia = '';
}
varia = JSON.stringify({
    'custom': varia
});
// varia = java.base64Encode(varia);
//java.log(`${base_url}/catalog?book_id=${book_id}&source=${sources}&tab=${tab}&variable=${varia},${op}`);
let data = java.ajax(
    `${base_url}/catalog?book_id=${book_id}&source=${sources}&tab=${tab}&variable=${varia},${op}`
);
let device, device_type;
try {
    device = java.deviceID();
    device_type = "苹果";
} catch (e) {
    try {
        device = java.androidId();
        device_type = "安卓";
    } catch (e) {
        device = "";
        device_type = "安卓";
    }
}

if (tab == "小说") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 8;
    } else {
        book.type = 0;
    }
} else if (tab == "听书") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 32;
    } else {
        book.type = 1;
    }
} else if (tab == "漫画") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 64;
    } else {
        book.type = 2;
    }
} else if (tab == "短剧") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 8;
    } else {
        book.type = 3;
    }
} else {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 8;
    } else {
        book.type = 0;
    }
}
let qtcookie = cookie.getCookie(base_url);
let reading = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "reading");

if (book && book.order != 0 && reading == '1') {
    try {
        if (!data || !book.variable || !base_url || !qtcookie) {
            java.log('缺少必要参数');
        } else {
            let parsedData;
            try {
                parsedData = JSON.parse(data);
            } catch (e) {
                java.log('解析data数据失败:' + e);
            }
            
            if (parsedData && parsedData.data && Array.isArray(parsedData.data) && parsedData.data[book.durChapterIndex]) {
                let ritem = parsedData.data[book.durChapterIndex];
                let bookInfoObj;
                try {
                    bookInfoObj = JSON.parse(book.variable);
                } catch (e) {
                    java.log('解析book.variable失败:' + e);
                }
                
                if (bookInfoObj) {
                    let book_info;
                    try {
                        book_info = JSON.parse(bookInfoObj.book_detail || JSON.stringify(bookInfoObj));
                    } catch (e) {
                        java.log('解析book_detail失败:' + e);
                    }
                    
                    if (book_info && typeof book_info === 'object') {
                        let rurl = base_url + '/add_book_to_book_shelf,';
                        book_info['read_status'] = 1;
                        book_info['last_chapter_item_id'] = ritem.item_id || '';
                        book_info['last_chapter_title'] = ritem.title || '';
                        let rop = {
                            method: "POST",
                            headers: {
                                cookie: qtcookie
                            },
                            body: book_info
                        };
                        let check_book_url = base_url + '/check_book_in_book_shelf,';
                        let checkResponse;
                        
                        try {
                            checkResponse = java.ajax(check_book_url + JSON.stringify(rop));
                        } catch (e) {
                            java.log('检查书籍请求失败:' + e);
                        }
                        
                        if (checkResponse) {
                            let check_data;
                            try {
                                check_data = JSON.parse(checkResponse).data;
                            } catch (e) {
                                java.log('解析检查响应失败:' + e);
                            }
                            try {
                                if (check_data && check_data.id) {
                                    book_info['id'] = check_data.id;
                                    let uurl = base_url + '/update_book_shelf,';
                                    java.ajax(uurl + JSON.stringify(rop));
                                } else {
                                    java.ajax(rurl + JSON.stringify(rop));
                                }
                            } catch (e) {
                                java.log('书架操作失败:' + e);
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    } catch (error) {
        java.log('书籍同步流程异常:' + error);
        java.longToast('\n同步阅读进度失败，但不影响阅读，可以前往登录关闭书架同步功能。');
    }
}
data;

searchUrl:
<js>
let base_url = getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'server');
let media;
let sources = getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'source');
let disabled_sources = getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'disabled_sources');
if (String(key).startsWith("m:") || String(key).startsWith("m：")) {
    media = "漫画"
    key = key.slice(2)
} else if (String(key).startsWith("t:") || String(key).startsWith("t：")) {
    media = "听书"
    key = key.slice(2)
} else if (String(key).startsWith("d:") || String(key).startsWith("d：")) {
    media = "短剧"
    key = key.slice(2)
} else if (String(key).startsWith("x:") || String(key).startsWith("x：")) {
    media = "小说"
    key = key.slice(2)
} else {
    media = getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'media');
}
if (key.includes('@')) {
    var parts = key.split('@');
    key = parts[0];
    sources = parts[1] || sources;
}
let qtcookie = cookie.getCookie(base_url);
let op = {
    method: "GET",
    headers: {
        cookie: qtcookie
    },
};
op = JSON.stringify(op);
`${base_url}/search?title=${key}&tab=${media}&source=${sources}&page={{page}}&disabled_sources=${disabled_sources},${op}`
</js>

exploreUrl:
<js>
function setArgument(key, value) {
    var open_argument = source.getVariable();
    open_argument = getArguments(open_argument, '') || {};
    open_argument[key] = value;
    var result = JSON.stringify(open_argument);
    source.setVariable(result);
    return result;
}

var open_argument = source.getVariable();
var base_url = getArguments(open_argument, 'server') || '';
var ms = getArguments(open_argument, 'tone_id') || '';
var source_type = getArguments(open_argument, 'source_type') || '男频';
var tab = getArguments(open_argument, 'tab') || '小说';
var sources = getArguments(open_argument, 'sources') || '番茄';


var sdtoken;
try {
    var loginInfoMap = source.getLoginInfoMap ? source.getLoginInfoMap() : {};
    sdtoken = String(loginInfoMap['手动填写番茄token(可不填)'] || '');
} catch (e) {
    sdtoken = '';
}

var rawCookie = getFanqieCookie() || sdtoken;
var match = rawCookie.match(/sessionid=[^;]+/);
var fqcookie = match ? match[0] : '';
var fqssionid = '';
if (!fqcookie) {
    java.toast('您还未登陆番茄账号，无法同步数据哦！');
} else {
    fqssionid = getSessionId(fqcookie)
}
var fqsjurl = base_url + "/bookshelf?page={{page}}&ssionid=" + fqssionid;
var fqtjurl = base_url + "/fqrecommend?page={{page}}&ssionid=" + fqssionid;
var fqlsurl = base_url + "/fqhistory?page={{page}}&ssionid=" + fqssionid;

var groupDatas = [];
var infoData = [];

function deviceType() {
    try {
        return !!java.androidId();
    } catch (e) {
        return false;
    }
}

var hasValidCookie = fqcookie.length > 0;

if (hasValidCookie) {
    function groupQuery() {
        try {
            var url = base_url + "/group_name?ssionid=" + fqssionid;
            var res = java.ajax(url);
            var response = JSON.parse(res);

            if (!(response && response.data)) {}

            response.data.forEach(function(group) {
                var keys = Object.keys(group);
                if (keys.length > 0) {
                    var key = keys[0];
                    var value = group[key];
                    if (value && value.length) {
                        var option = {
                            "method": "POST",
                            "body": {
                                "book_ids": value,
                                "page": "{{page}}"
                            }
                        };
                        groupDatas.push({
                            title: key,
                            url: base_url + "/bookshelf," + JSON.stringify(option),
                            style: {
                                layout_flexGrow: 1,
                                layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                            }
                        });
                    }
                }
            });

            if (groupDatas.length % 2 !== 0) {
                groupDatas.push({
                    title: "--",
                    url: "",
                    style: {
                        layout_flexGrow: 1,
                        layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                    }
                });
            }
        } catch (e) {
            java.longToast("番茄登录过期，已隐藏番茄书架");
        }
    }

    try {
        java.longToast("正在加载分组数据...");
        var userUrl = base_url + "/fquser?ssionid=" + fqssionid;
        var userRes = java.ajax(userUrl);
        var userData = JSON.parse(userRes);

        var userName = (userData && userData.data && userData.data.name) ? userData.data.name : '未知用户';
        if (!userName.includes('未知用户')) {
            infoData = [{
                title: "番茄个人中心",
                url: fqsjurl,
                style: {
                    layout_flexGrow: 1,
                    layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                }
            }, {
                title: "个性推荐(番茄)",
                url: fqtjurl,
                style: {
                    layout_flexGrow: 1,
                    layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                }
            }, {
                title: "历史阅读(番茄)",
                url: fqlsurl,
                style: {
                    layout_flexGrow: 1,
                    layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                }
            }];
        }
        groupQuery();
    } catch (e) {
        java.longToast("番茄登录过期，已隐藏番茄书架");
    }
}

var style_list = [];
try {
    var durl = `${base_url}/discovestyle?source=${sources}&source_type=${source_type}&tab=${tab}`;
    var res = java.ajax(durl);
    var result = JSON.parse(res);
    style_list = result.data || [];
    if (result.msg) {
        java.toast(result.msg);
    }
} catch (e) {
    java.toast("发现样式获取失败");
}
let qtcookie = cookie.getCookie(base_url);
let qtop = {
    method: "GET",
    headers: {
        cookie: qtcookie
    },
};
qtop = JSON.stringify(qtop);
let qtsjurl = base_url+'/get_book_shelf,'+qtop
let qtsj = [{
                title: "晴天个人中心",
                url: qtsjurl,
                style: {
                    layout_flexGrow: 1,
                    layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                }
            }]
var finalData = infoData.concat(groupDatas, style_list);
finalData = qtsj.concat(finalData);
JSON.stringify(finalData);
</js>

if (String(baseUrl).startsWith("data:")) {

    let book_id = res.book_id;

    let sources = res.sources;

    let html = "";

    if (url != "" && proxy == "本地") {
        if (sources == '69书吧') {
            let ck69 = String(cookie.getCookie('https://www.69shuba.com'));
            let headers = {
        	 "Referer": url,
            "Cookie": ck69,
            "User-Agent":  java.getWebViewUA()
             };            
             let op = JSON.stringify({
                "headers": headers

            html = java.ajax(`${url},${op}`);
        } else {

        }
        //java.log(html);

             java.log(html);
        }

    result = java.ajax(`${base_url}/detail?book_id=${book_id}&source=${sources}&tab=${tab}&variable=${varia},${op}`);
}
result
</js>$.data
ruleBookInfo.intro:
<js>
let {
    book_id,
    source: sources,
    tab,
    book_tts,
    tags,
    role,
    last_chapter_title,
    last_chapter_update_time,
    word_number,
    status,
    score,
    abstract,
    copyright_info
} = result;
let proxy = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "proxy");
if (proxy == "本地") {
    proxy = "本地网络";
} else {
    proxy = "服务器网络";
}
java.put("book_detail", JSON.stringify(result));
let base_url = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "server");
let key = "";
try {
    let cookieValue =
        String(cookie.getCookie(base_url)) || String(java.getCookie(base_url));
    key = getKey(cookieValue);
} catch (e) {
    key = "";
}

if (key == "") {
    java.log("当前服务器未查询到登录状态，尝试查询其他服务器登录状态...");
    let cookieValue;
    for (let h of host) {
        try {
            cookieValue = String(cookie.getCookie(h)) || String(java.getCookie(h));
            key = getKey(cookieValue);
        } catch (e) {
            key = "";
        }
        if (key) {
            java.log(`已在${h}登录，退出查询，正在转移登录状态到当前服务${base_url}`);
            //java.log(cookieValue)
            removeCookie(h);
            removeCookie(base_url);
            cookie.setCookie(base_url, cookieValue);
            break;
        }
    }
}

if (book.readConfig == null || book.readConfig.useReplaceRule == null) {
    book.setUseReplaceRule(false);
}

let nickname = '账号状态：⚠️ 未登录 | 点击右上角 🔖 登录';
try {
    let opcx = {
        method: "GET",
        headers: {
            cookie: 'qttoken=' + key + ';'
        },
    };
    opcx = JSON.stringify(opcx);
    let user_info = JSON.parse(java.ajax(base_url + '/get_avatar,' + opcx));
    if (user_info.code == 0) {
        if (user_info.nickname) {
            nickname = '欢迎回来：' + user_info.nickname
        } else {
            nickname = '欢迎回来：' + user_info.email + "(请前往用户后台设置用户名)"
        }
    }
} catch (e) {
    if (key) {
        nickname = '账号状态：已登录'
    }
};

let loginStatus = nickname;

let lightDivider = "❇️───────❇️───────❇️";
let heavyDivider = "‎\n‎";

let isValid = (value) => String(value).length > 1;
let ctitle = book.durChapterTitle || '未开始';
let info = `
    📡 当前服务：${base_url}
    🔑 ${loginStatus}
    🏷 数据来源：${sources}
    🔄 当前模式：${tab}
    ⚙️ 访问模式：${proxy}
    📖 阅读至：${ctitle}
`;

if (tab == "听书") {
    //let toneId = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "tone_id");
    let toneId = String(book.getVariable('custom'));
    if (toneId == '') {
    	toneId= '4';
    	}
    if (isValid(book_tts)) {
        info += `${lightDivider}
    🎵 音色配置：${toneId}
    ✨ AI音色请点击右上角书籍变量填写相关值，真人听书请重新搜索选择带有主播的书籍
    ${book_tts}
`;
    }
}

let basicInfo = "";
let addBasicInfo = (value, prefix, icon) => {
    if (isValid(value)) basicInfo += `    ${icon} ${prefix} ${value}\n`;
};

addBasicInfo(tags, "书籍分类：", "🌈");
addBasicInfo(role, "书籍主角：", "👑");
addBasicInfo(last_chapter_title, "最新章节：", "📚");
addBasicInfo(last_chapter_update_time, "更新时间：", "⏳");
addBasicInfo(word_number, "书籍字数：", "📊");
addBasicInfo(status, "书籍状态：", "🚩");
addBasicInfo(score, "书籍评分：", "⭐");

if (basicInfo) info += `${lightDivider}\n${basicInfo}`;

if (isValid(abstract)) {
    let indentedAbstract = abstract
        .split("\n")
        .map((line) => `    ${line}`)
        .join("\n");
    info += `${heavyDivider}
    📖 书籍简介：
${indentedAbstract}
`;
} else {
    info += `${heavyDivider}`;
}

if (isValid(copyright_info)) {
    info += `${lightDivider}
    © ${copyright_info}
`;
} else {
    info += `${lightDivider}`;
}

info += `
${heavyDivider}
    💠💠💠 数据更新于 ${new Date().toLocaleString()} 💠💠💠
`;
let jjinfo = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "info");

if (jjinfo != "off") {
    info = String(info)
        .split("\n")
        .map((line) => line.replace(/^ {4}/, ""))
        .join("\n");
} else {
    basicInfo = "";
    addBasicInfo(last_chapter_title, "最新章节：", "📚");
    addBasicInfo(last_chapter_update_time, "更新时间：", "⏳");
    addBasicInfo(word_number, "书籍字数：", "📊");
    addBasicInfo(status, "书籍状态：", "🚩");
    addBasicInfo(score, "书籍评分：", "⭐");
    if (isValid(abstract)) {
        let indentedAbstract = abstract
            .split("\n")
            .map((line) => `    ${line}`)
            .join("\n");
        basicInfo += `
    \n‎
    📖 书籍简介：
${indentedAbstract}
`;
    } else {
        basicInfo += `${heavyDivider}`;
    }
    info = `‎\n🏷 数据来源：${sources}\n` + basicInfo;
}
</js>

ruleContent.content:
<js>
java.log(result)
result = String(java.hexDecodeToString(result));
let res;
if (result.match(/晴天融合/)) {
    result = result.split("晴天融合4");
    res = {
        item_id: result[0],
        tab: result[1],
        title: result[2],
        sources: result[3],
        url: ""
    };
} else {
    res = JSON.parse(result);
}
let varia = String(book.getVariable('custom'));
if (varia == 'null') {
    varia = '';
}
varia = JSON.stringify({
    'custom': varia
});
//  varia = java.base64Encode(varia);
let book_id = res.book_id;
let item_id = res.item_id;
let tab = res.tab;
let title = res.title;
let sources = res.sources;
let url = res.url;
let html = "";
let proxy = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "proxy");
if (url != "" && proxy == "本地") {
    if (sources == '69书吧') {
        let ck69 = String(cookie.getCookie('https://www.69shuba.com'));
        let headers = {
            "Referer": url,
            "Cookie": ck69,
            "User-Agent": java.getWebViewUA()
        };
        let op = JSON.stringify({
            "headers": headers
        });
        java.log(url);
        java.log(op);
        html = java.ajax(`${url},${op}`);
    } else {
        html = java.ajax(url);
    }
    java.log('dddddddddddddddddddddddddddd')
    java.log(html);
    if (html.includes("Just a moment...") && sources == '69书吧' && book.durChapterIndex === chapter.index) {
        cookie.removeCookie('https://www.69shuba.com');
        java.longToast('需要真人验证，请进入任意书籍详情页过验证');
        html = java.startBrowserAwait(url, "需要真人验证，请进入任意书籍详情页过验证").body();
        java.log('cscscscs')
        java.log(html);
    }
};
let content = "";
let data;
//let tone_id = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "tone_id");
let tone_id = varia;
if (tone_id == '') {
    tone_id = '4';
}
let base_url = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "server");
let fqpara = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "fqpara");
let device, device_type;
try {
    device = java.deviceID();
    device_type = "苹果";
} catch (e) {
    try {
        device = java.androidId();
        device_type = "安卓";
    } catch (e) {
        device = "";
        device_type = "安卓";
    }
}

let qtcookie = cookie.getCookie(base_url);
try {
    qtcookie = `qttoken=${String(cookie.getKey(base_url, "qttoken"))}; deviceId=${device};`
} catch (e) {}

var params = {
    html: html,
    item_id: item_id,
    source: sources,
    tab: tab,
    tone_id: tone_id,
    variable: varia,
    version: '4.11.5.1'
};

var content_url = '/content';
if ((sources == "番茄" || sources == "七猫" || sources == "塔读") && fqpara && tab == "小说") {
    content_url = '/content?review=1';
}

//var signInfo = generateComplexSignature('POST', content_url, {}, APP_SECRET, params);


//var signedParams = copyObject(params);
//signedParams.timestamp = signInfo.timestamp;
//signedParams.nonce = signInfo.nonce;
//signedParams.sign = signInfo.sign;


var op = {
    method: "POST",
    body: JSON.stringify(params),
    headers: {
        cookie: qtcookie,
        'Content-Type': 'application/json'
    }
};

op = JSON.stringify(op);
java.log(op);
data = java.ajax(base_url + content_url + `,${op}`);
try {
    data = JSON.parse(data);
    if (data.msg) {
        java.toast(data.msg);
    }
} catch (e) {}
content = data.content
if ((sources == "番茄" || sources == "七猫" || sources == "塔读") && fqpara == "on" && tab == "小说") {
    var sdtoken;
    try {
        var loginInfoMap = source.getLoginInfoMap ? source.getLoginInfoMap() : {};
        sdtoken = String(loginInfoMap['手动填写番茄token(可不填)'] || '');
    } catch (e) {
        sdtoken = '';
    }
    var rawCookie = getFanqieCookie() || sdtoken;
    var match = rawCookie.match(/sessionid=[^;]+/);
    var fqcookie = match ? match[0] : '';
    var fqssionid = '';
    if (!fqcookie) {} else {
        fqssionid = getSessionId(fqcookie)
    }
    content = content
        .replace(/ident="/g, 'ident="' + base_url)
        .replace(/book_id=/g, 'book_id=' + book_id + '&ssionid=' + fqssionid);
    if (device_type == "苹果") {
        content = paraForiOS(content, sources);
    } else {
        content = paraForAndroid(content, sources);
    }
}
data = JSON.stringify({
    content: content,
});
if (device_type == "安卓" && (tab == "短剧" || tab == "视频" || sources == '毒舌影视')) {
    data = {
        content: `【右上角刷新】开启播放(下一集请切换下一章刷新)\n播放直链：\n${content}`,
    };
    data = JSON.stringify(data);
    if (book.durChapterIndex === chapter.index) {
        let video_url = `${base_url}/online_video?book_id=${book_id}&source=${sources}&tab=${tab}`;
        if (sources == '毒舌影视') {
            video_url = content;
        };
        java.startBrowser(video_url, title);
        java.toast("正在加载视频...");
    }

}
data;
</js>$.content

ruleToc.chapterList:
<js>
let res = JSON.parse(java.hexDecodeToString(result));
if (res.method) {
    res = Object.fromEntries(
        res.body
        .replace("source", "sources")
        .split("&")
        .map((query) => query.split("="))
    );
    res.url = "";
}
let book_id = res.book_id;
java.put('book_id', book_id);
let tab = res.tab;
let sources = res.sources;
let url = res.url;
let html = "";
let proxy = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "proxy");
if (url != "" && proxy == "本地") {
    if (sources == '69书吧') {
        let ck69 = String(cookie.getCookie('https://www.69shuba.com'));
        let headers = {
        	 "Referer": url,
            "Cookie": ck69,
            "User-Agent":  java.getWebViewUA()
             };
        let op = JSON.stringify({
            "headers": headers
        });
        html = java.ajax(`${url},${op}`);    
    } else {
        html = java.ajax(url);
    }
    //java.log(html);
    if (html.includes("Just a moment...") && sources == '69书吧') {
        cookie.removeCookie('https://www.69shuba.com');
        java.longToast('需要真人验证，请进入任意书籍详情页过验证');
        html = java.startBrowserAwait(url, "需要真人验证，请进入任意书籍详情页过验证").body();

           java.log(html);
    }
};
let base_url = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "server");
let op = {
    method: "POST",
    body: {
        html: html
    }
};
op = JSON.stringify(op);
let varia = String(book.getVariable('custom'));
if (varia == 'null') {
    varia = '';
}
varia = JSON.stringify({
    'custom': varia
});
// varia = java.base64Encode(varia);
//java.log(`${base_url}/catalog?book_id=${book_id}&source=${sources}&tab=${tab}&variable=${varia},${op}`);
let data = java.ajax(
    `${base_url}/catalog?book_id=${book_id}&source=${sources}&tab=${tab}&variable=${varia},${op}`
);
let device, device_type;
try {
    device = java.deviceID();
    device_type = "苹果";
} catch (e) {
    try {
        device = java.androidId();
        device_type = "安卓";
    } catch (e) {
        device = "";
        device_type = "安卓";
    }
}

if (tab == "小说") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 8;
    } else {
        book.type = 0;
    }
} else if (tab == "听书") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 32;
    } else {
        book.type = 1;
    }
} else if (tab == "漫画") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 64;
    } else {
        book.type = 2;
    }
} else if (tab == "短剧") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 8;
    } else {
        book.type = 3;
    }
} else {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 8;
    } else {
        book.type = 0;
    }
}
let qtcookie = cookie.getCookie(base_url);
let reading = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "reading");

if (book && book.order != 0 && reading == '1') {
    try {
        if (!data || !book.variable || !base_url || !qtcookie) {
            java.log('缺少必要参数');
        } else {
            let parsedData;
            try {
                parsedData = JSON.parse(data);
            } catch (e) {
                java.log('解析data数据失败:' + e);
            }
            
            if (parsedData && parsedData.data && Array.isArray(parsedData.data) && parsedData.data[book.durChapterIndex]) {
                let ritem = parsedData.data[book.durChapterIndex];
                let bookInfoObj;
                try {
                    bookInfoObj = JSON.parse(book.variable);
                } catch (e) {
                    java.log('解析book.variable失败:' + e);
                }
                
                if (bookInfoObj) {
                    let book_info;
                    try {
                        book_info = JSON.parse(bookInfoObj.book_detail || JSON.stringify(bookInfoObj));
                    } catch (e) {
                        java.log('解析book_detail失败:' + e);
                    }
                    
                    if (book_info && typeof book_info === 'object') {
                        let rurl = base_url + '/add_book_to_book_shelf,';
                        book_info['read_status'] = 1;
                        book_info['last_chapter_item_id'] = ritem.item_id || '';
                        book_info['last_chapter_title'] = ritem.title || '';
                        let rop = {
                            method: "POST",
                            headers: {
                                cookie: qtcookie
                            },
                            body: book_info
                        };
                        let check_book_url = base_url + '/check_book_in_book_shelf,';
                        let checkResponse;
                        
                        try {
                            checkResponse = java.ajax(check_book_url + JSON.stringify(rop));
                        } catch (e) {
                            java.log('检查书籍请求失败:' + e);
                        }
                        
                        if (checkResponse) {
                            let check_data;
                            try {
                                check_data = JSON.parse(checkResponse).data;
                            } catch (e) {
                                java.log('解析检查响应失败:' + e);
                            }
                            try {
                                if (check_data && check_data.id) {
                                    book_info['id'] = check_data.id;
                                    let uurl = base_url + '/update_book_shelf,';
                                    java.ajax(uurl + JSON.stringify(rop));
                                } else {
                                    java.ajax(rurl + JSON.stringify(rop));
                                }
                            } catch (e) {
                                java.log('书架操作失败:' + e);
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    } catch (error) {
        java.log('书籍同步流程异常:' + error);
        java.longToast('\n同步阅读进度失败，但不影响阅读，可以前往登录关闭书架同步功能。');
    }
}
data;

ruleToc.chapterUrl:
<js>
let tab = result.tab;
let sources = result.source;
let title = result.title;
let item_id = result.item_id;
let book_id = java.get("book_id");
let url = result.toc_url || "";
let qtcontent = {
    book_id: book_id,
    item_id: item_id,
    title: title,
    sources: sources,
    tab: tab,
    url: url,
};
qtcontent = java.base64Encode(JSON.stringify(qtcontent));
if (sources == '卷') {
    content_url = item_id
} else if ((sources == "番茄" || sources == "七猫" || sources == "塔读") && tab == "小说") {
    var base_url = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "server") || "";
    var sdtoken;
    try {
        var loginInfoMap = source.getLoginInfoMap ? source.getLoginInfoMap() : {};
        sdtoken = String(loginInfoMap['手动填写番茄token(可不填)'] || '');
    } catch (e) {
        sdtoken = '';
    }
    var rawCookie = getFanqieCookie() || sdtoken;
    var match = rawCookie.match(/sessionid=[^;]+/);
    var fqcookie = match ? match[0] : '';
    var fqssionid = '';
    if (!fqcookie) {} else {
        fqssionid = getSessionId(fqcookie)
    }
    let sourcess = sources.replace('svip_', '');
    content_url = `data:;base64,${qtcontent},{"type":"qingtian3","js":"book ? result : '${base_url}/get_review?book_id=${book_id}&item_id=${item_id}&ssionid=${fqssionid}&source=${sourcess}'"}`;
} else {
    content_url = `data:;base64,${qtcontent},{"type":"qingtian3"}`;
}
</js>

searchUrl:
<js>
let base_url = getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'server');
let media;
let sources = getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'sources') || getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'source');
let disabled_sources = getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'disabled_sources') || '0';
if (String(key).startsWith("m:") || String(key).startsWith("m：")) {
    media = "漫画"
    key = key.slice(2)
} else if (String(key).startsWith("t:") || String(key).startsWith("t：")) {
    media = "听书"
    key = key.slice(2)
} else if (String(key).startsWith("d:") || String(key).startsWith("d：")) {
    media = "短剧"
    key = key.slice(2)
} else if (String(key).startsWith("x:") || String(key).startsWith("x：")) {
    media = "小说"
    key = key.slice(2)
} else {
    media = getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'tab') || getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'media');
}
if (key.includes('@')) {
    var parts = key.split('@');
    key = parts[0];
    sources = parts[1] || sources;
}
let qtcookie = cookie.getCookie(base_url);
let op = {
    method: "GET",
    headers: {
        cookie: qtcookie
    },
};
op = JSON.stringify(op);
`${base_url}/search?title=${key}&tab=${media}&source=${sources}&page={{page}}&disabled_sources=${disabled_sources},${op}`
</js>

ruleExplore.bookList:
<js>
let list = [];
let resultData = JSON.parse(result);

let targetData = resultData.data || resultData.list || resultData.book_list || 
                resultData.publication_list || resultData.result || resultData;
                
if (targetData != null && targetData.book_shelf_info) {
    let bookIds = targetData.book_shelf_info.map(item => `{"book_id": "${item.book_id}"}`).join(',');
    
    let booksData = java.ajax(
`https://fanqienovel.com/api/bookshelf/multidetail,{"method": "post","body": {"books":[${bookIds}]}}`
        );
    
    let books = JSON.parse(booksData).data.detail_list;
    for (let i in books) {
        let d = books[i];
        list.push({
            src: d,
            book_name: d.book_name,
            author: d.author,
            category:d.category,
            tags:d.tags,
            word_number:d.word_number,
            lastChapterTitle: d.last_chapter_title,
            abstract: d.abstract,
            book_id: d.book_id,
        });
    }
} else {
    list = targetData.content || targetData;
}

JSON.stringify({data: list})
</js>

ruleContent.content:
if(java.get("is_bundle")=="false"){ html = java.ajax("https://read.douban.com"); eval(html.match(/Ark\.(user = \{[\s\S]+?\})/)[1]); cok = user.id??"anonymous"; t = String(java.getString("$.data")); function name(){ try { const decodedBytes = java.base64DecodeToByteArray(t); const totalLen = decodedBytes.length; const ivStart = totalLen - 16 - 13; const ivBytes = decodedBytes.slice(ivStart, ivStart + 16); const encryptedBytes = decodedBytes.slice(0, ivStart); const hashedKey = java.digestHex(cok, "SHA-256"); const cipher = java.createSymmetricCrypto("AES/CBC/PKCS5Padding", java.hexDecodeToByteArray(hashedKey), ivBytes ); const decryptedStr = cipher.decryptStr(encryptedBytes); const jsonObj = JSON.parse(decryptedStr); result = JSON.stringify(jsonObj.posts[0].contents); } catch (e) { java.log("解密错误: " + e); result = null; } return result } ddd = name(); const bbb = book.getVariable("custom"); const sss = source.getVariable(); /* 规范Json数据 const pattern = /:"([\s\S]+?)"(,"|\}|\])/g; ddd = String(ddd).replace(pattern, (match, content,suffix) => { let replacedContent = content.replace(/"/g, '\\"'); return `:"${replacedContent}"${suffix}`; }).replace(/\n+/g,'\\n').replace(/[\x00-\x1F\x7F]/g,''); */ var data = JSON.parse(String(ddd)); function extractContent(item) { const textList = item.data?.text; const process = (content) => { if (typeof content === 'string') { if(content==""){ content ="\n‎\n" } return content; } if (Array.isArray(content)) { return content.map(process).join(''); } if (content && (content.content || content.content==="")) { let c; if(content.kind == "footnote"){ try{ book.getVariable(); c = getImage(content.content) }catch(e){} if(/1/.test(sss)||/1/.test(bbb))c = "【*"+content.content+"】" }else{ c = content.content } return process(c); } return ''; }; return process(textList); } function getChapterContent(chapterNumber) { let chapterContent = []; let currentChapter = -1; let isFirstHeadlineFound = false; for (let i = 0; i < data.length; i++) { let item = data[i]; if (item.type === 'headline') { currentChapter++; if (!isFirstHeadlineFound) { isFirstHeadlineFound = true; } if (currentChapter > chapterNumber) { break; } } if ((currentChapter === chapterNumber) || (chapterNumber === 0 && !isFirstHeadlineFound && item.type !== 'headline')) { if(item.type === "illus")chapterContent.push(`\n`); if(item.type !== 'headline')chapterContent.push(extractContent(item)); } } return chapterContent.length > 0 ? chapterContent.join('\n') : null; } result = ""; // 检查是否需要使用章节逻辑 if (book.bookUrl.includes("ebook")) { let index = chapter.index; result = getChapterContent(index); } else { // 遍历数据，提取并拼接 content data.forEach(item => { if(item.type === "illus")result += `\n` result += extractContent(item) + "\n"; // 每个段落换行 }); } }else{ bookName = java.getString("@class.article-title@text"); bookAuthor = java.getString("@class.author-item@text"); imgSrc = java.getString("@class.cover shadow-cover@img@src"); info = java.getString("@class.info@p@text"); result = `❗️刷新本章跳转加入书架界面❗️\n书名：${bookName}\n作者：${bookAuthor}\n\n简介：\n${info}` if(book.durChapterIndex === chapter.index){ url = "legado://import/addToBookshelf?src="+baseUrl; script = `data:text/html;charset=utf-8, 《${bookName}》加入书架

跳转加入书架

简介：${info}

`; java.startBrowser(script,"《"+bookName+"》") } } result

");

    url

  }

    isOrigin

    }
    ... on WorksBase @include(if: true) {

    }

    ... on WorksBase @include(if: true) {

  }

    }

    }
  
    }
    ... on WorksBase @include(if: false) {

      }
    }
    ... on WorksBase @include(if: false) {
      fanfiction {
        fandoms {
          title
          url
        }
      }
    }
    ... on WorksBase @include(if: false) {
      fanfiction {
        kudoCount
      }
    }
  
                
            }
          }
        ",
  "operationName": "getWorksList"
}
headers={}

function getFree(headers){
	url = "https://read.douban.com/j/graphql",
	option = {
		"method":"POST",
		"body":body
		}
		if(headers)option["headers"]=headers;
		url = url+","+JSON.stringify(option)
   return	java.ajax(url);
}
result = getFree(headers);
if(/登录状态异常/.test(result)){
	x = result.match(/Ark.CSRF_TOKEN = '([^']+)'/)[1];
	headers["x-csrf-token"] = x;
	result = getFree(headers);
	}
	}
	result

<js>
function setArgument(key, value) {
    var open_argument = source.getVariable();
    open_argument = getArguments(open_argument, '') || {};
    open_argument[key] = value;
    var result = JSON.stringify(open_argument);
    source.setVariable(result);
    return result;
}

var open_argument = source.getVariable();
var base_url = getArguments(open_argument, 'server') || '';
var ms = getArguments(open_argument, 'tone_id') || '';
var source_type = getArguments(open_argument, 'source_type') || '男频';
var tab = getArguments(open_argument, 'media') || '小说';
var sources = getArguments(open_argument, 'source') || '番茄';


var sdtoken;
try {
    var loginInfoMap = source.getLoginInfoMap ? source.getLoginInfoMap() : {};
    sdtoken = String(loginInfoMap['手动填写番茄token(可不填)'] || '');
} catch (e) {
    sdtoken = '';
}

var rawCookie = getFanqieCookie() || sdtoken;
var match = rawCookie.match(/sessionid=[^;]+/);
var fqcookie = match ? match[0] : '';
var fqssionid = '';
if (!fqcookie) {
    java.toast('您还未登陆番茄账号，无法同步数据哦！');
} else {
    fqssionid = getSessionId(fqcookie)
}
var fqsjurl = base_url + "/bookshelf?page={{page}}&ssionid=" + fqssionid;
var fqtjurl = base_url + "/fqrecommend?page={{page}}&ssionid=" + fqssionid;
var fqlsurl = base_url + "/fqhistory?page={{page}}&ssionid=" + fqssionid;

var groupDatas = [];
var infoData = [];

function deviceType() {
    try {
        return !!java.androidId();
    } catch (e) {
        return false;
    }
}

var hasValidCookie = fqcookie.length > 0;

if (hasValidCookie) {
    function groupQuery() {
        try {
            var url = base_url + "/group_name?ssionid=" + fqssionid;
            var res = java.ajax(url);
            var response = JSON.parse(res);

            if (!(response && response.data)) {}

            response.data.forEach(function(group) {
                var keys = Object.keys(group);
                if (keys.length > 0) {
                    var key = keys[0];
                    var value = group[key];
                    if (value && value.length) {
                        var option = {
                            "method": "POST",
                            "body": {
                                "book_ids": value,
                                "page": "{{page}}"
                            }
                        };
                        groupDatas.push({
                            title: key,
                            url: base_url + "/bookshelf," + JSON.stringify(option),
                            style: {
                                layout_flexGrow: 1,
                                layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                            }
                        });
                    }
                }
            });

            if (groupDatas.length % 2 !== 0) {
                groupDatas.push({
                    title: "--",
                    url: "",
                    style: {
                        layout_flexGrow: 1,
                        layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                    }
                });
            }
        } catch (e) {
            java.longToast("番茄登录过期，已隐藏番茄书架");
        }
    }

    try {
        java.longToast("正在加载分组数据...");
        var userUrl = base_url + "/fquser?ssionid=" + fqssionid;
        var userRes = java.ajax(userUrl);
        var userData = JSON.parse(userRes);

        var userName = (userData && userData.data && userData.data.name) ? userData.data.name : '未知用户';
        if (!userName.includes('未知用户')) {
            infoData = [{
                title: "番茄个人中心",
                url: fqsjurl,
                style: {
                    layout_flexGrow: 1,
                    layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                }
            }, {
                title: "个性推荐(番茄)",
                url: fqtjurl,
                style: {
                    layout_flexGrow: 1,
                    layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                }
            }, {
                title: "历史阅读(番茄)",
                url: fqlsurl,
                style: {
                    layout_flexGrow: 1,
                    layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                }
            }];
        }
        groupQuery();
    } catch (e) {
        java.longToast("番茄登录过期，已隐藏番茄书架");
    }
}

var style_list = [];
try {
    var durl = `${base_url}/discovestyle?source=${sources}&source_type=${source_type}&tab=${tab}`;
    var res = java.ajax(durl);
    var result = JSON.parse(res);
    style_list = result.data || [];
    if (result.msg) {
        java.toast(result.msg);
    }
} catch (e) {
    java.toast("发现样式获取失败");
}
let qtcookie = cookie.getCookie(base_url);
let qtop = {
    method: "GET",
    headers: {
        cookie: qtcookie
    },
};
qtop = JSON.stringify(qtop);
let qtsjurl = base_url+'/get_book_shelf,'+qtop
let qtsj = [{
                title: "大灰狼个人中心",
                url: qtsjurl,
                style: {
                    layout_flexGrow: 1,
                    layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                }
            }]
var finalData = infoData.concat(groupDatas, style_list);
finalData = qtsj.concat(finalData);
JSON.stringify(finalData);
</js>

ruleBookInfo.intro:
<js>
let {
    book_id,
    source: sources,
    tab,
    book_tts,
    tags,
    role,
    last_chapter_title,
    last_chapter_update_time,
    word_number,
    status,
    score,
    abstract,
    copyright_info
} = result;
let proxy = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "proxy");
if (proxy == "本地") {
    proxy = "本地网络";
} else {
    proxy = "服务器网络";
}
java.put("book_detail", JSON.stringify(result));
let base_url = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "server");
let key = "";
try {
    let cookieValue =
        String(cookie.getCookie(base_url)) || String(java.getCookie(base_url));
    key = getKey(cookieValue);
} catch (e) {
    key = "";
}

if (key == "") {
    java.log("当前服务器未查询到登录状态，尝试查询其他服务器登录状态...");
    let cookieValue;
    for (let h of host) {
        try {
            cookieValue = String(cookie.getCookie(h)) || String(java.getCookie(h));
            key = getKey(cookieValue);
        } catch (e) {
            key = "";
        }
        if (key) {
            java.log(`已在${h}登录，退出查询，正在转移登录状态到当前服务${base_url}`);
            //java.log(cookieValue)
            removeCookie(h);
            removeCookie(base_url);
            cookie.setCookie(base_url, cookieValue);
            break;
        }
    }
}

if (book.readConfig == null || book.readConfig.useReplaceRule == null) {
    book.setUseReplaceRule(false);
}

let nickname = '账号状态：⚠️ 未登录 | 点击右上角 🔖 登录';
try {
    let opcx = {
        method: "GET",
        headers: {
            cookie: 'qttoken=' + key + ';'
        },
    };
    opcx = JSON.stringify(opcx);
    let user_info = JSON.parse(java.ajax(base_url + '/get_avatar,' + opcx));
    if (user_info.code == 0) {
        if (user_info.nickname) {
            nickname = '欢迎回来：' + user_info.nickname
        } else {
            nickname = '欢迎回来：' + user_info.email + "(请前往用户后台设置用户名)"
        }
    }
} catch (e) {
    if (key) {
        nickname = '账号状态：已登录'
    }
};

let loginStatus = nickname;

let lightDivider = "❇️───────❇️───────❇️";
let heavyDivider = "‎\n‎";

let isValid = (value) => String(value).length > 1;
let ctitle = book.durChapterTitle || '未开始';
let info = `
    📡 当前服务：${base_url}
    🔑 ${loginStatus}
    🏷 数据来源：${sources}
    🔄 当前模式：${tab}
    ⚙️ 访问模式：${proxy}
    📖 阅读至：${ctitle}
`;

if (tab == "听书") {
    let toneId = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "tone_id");
    if (isValid(book_tts)) {
        info += `${lightDivider}
    🎵 音色配置：${toneId}
    ${book_tts}
`;
    }
}

let basicInfo = "";
let addBasicInfo = (value, prefix, icon) => {
    if (isValid(value)) basicInfo += `    ${icon} ${prefix} ${value}\n`;
};

addBasicInfo(tags, "书籍分类：", "🌈");
addBasicInfo(role, "书籍主角：", "👑");
addBasicInfo(last_chapter_title, "最新章节：", "📚");
addBasicInfo(last_chapter_update_time, "更新时间：", "⏳");
addBasicInfo(word_number, "书籍字数：", "📊");
addBasicInfo(status, "书籍状态：", "🚩");
addBasicInfo(score, "书籍评分：", "⭐");

if (basicInfo) info += `${lightDivider}\n${basicInfo}`;

if (isValid(abstract)) {
    let indentedAbstract = abstract
        .split("\n")
        .map((line) => `    ${line}`)
        .join("\n");
    info += `${heavyDivider}
    📖 书籍简介：
${indentedAbstract}
`;
} else {
    info += `${heavyDivider}`;
}

if (isValid(copyright_info)) {
    info += `${lightDivider}
    © ${copyright_info}
`;
} else {
    info += `${lightDivider}`;
}

info += `
${heavyDivider}
    💠💠💠 数据更新于 ${new Date().toLocaleString()} 💠💠💠
`;
let jjinfo = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "info");

if (jjinfo != "on") {
    info = String(info)
        .split("\n")
        .map((line) => line.replace(/^ {4}/, ""))
        .join("\n");
} else {
    basicInfo = "";
    addBasicInfo(last_chapter_title, "最新章节：", "📚");
    addBasicInfo(last_chapter_update_time, "更新时间：", "⏳");
    addBasicInfo(word_number, "书籍字数：", "📊");
    addBasicInfo(status, "书籍状态：", "🚩");
    addBasicInfo(score, "书籍评分：", "⭐");
    if (isValid(abstract)) {
        let indentedAbstract = abstract
            .split("\n")
            .map((line) => `    ${line}`)
            .join("\n");
        basicInfo += `
    \n‎
    📖 书籍简介：
${indentedAbstract}
`;
    } else {
        basicInfo += `${heavyDivider}`;
    }
    info = `‎\n🏷 数据来源：${sources}\n` + basicInfo;
}
</js>

if (url != "" && proxy == "本地") {
    if (sources == '69书吧') {

        };

        });
        java.log(url);
        java.log(op);
        html = java.ajax(url + ',' + op);
    } else {
        html = java.ajax(url);
    }
    java.log(html);
    if (html.includes("Just a moment...") && sources == '69书吧' && book.durChapterIndex === chapter.index) {
        cookie.removeCookie(url);
        var x = url;
        java.longToast('需要真人验证，请进入任意书籍详情页过验证');
        var s = java.startBrowserAwait(x, "需要真人验证，请进入任意书籍详情页过验证").body();

        let ck69 = String(cookie.getCookie(url));
        let headers = {
            "User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 6.0; Nexus 5 Build/MRA58N) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/138.0.0.0 Mobile Safari/537.36 Edg/138.0.0.0",
            "Cookie": ck69
        };
        let op = JSON.stringify({
            "headers": headers
        });
        java.log(op);
        html = java.ajax(url + ',' + op);
        //java.log(html);
    }
};
let content = "";
let data;
let tone_id = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "tone_id");
let base_url = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "server");
let device, device_type;
try {
    device = java.deviceID();
    device_type = "苹果";
} catch (e) {
    try {
        device = java.androidId();
        device_type = "安卓";
    } catch (e) {
        device = "";
        device_type = "安卓";
    }
}

let qtcookie = cookie.getCookie(base_url);
try {
    qtcookie = `qttoken=${String(cookie.getKey(base_url, "qttoken"))}; deviceId=${device};`
} catch (e) {}

var params = {
    html: html,
    item_id: item_id,
    source: sources,
    tab: tab,
    tone_id: tone_id,
    variable: varia,
    version: '4.11.5.1'
};

var content_url = '/content';

if ((sources == "番茄" || sources == "七猫" || sources == "塔读") && getArguments(source.getVariable(), "fqpara") == "on" && tab == "小说") {
    content_url = '/content?review=1';
}

//var signInfo = generateComplexSignature('POST', content_url, {}, APP_SECRET, params);


//var signedParams = copyObject(params);
//signedParams.timestamp = signInfo.timestamp;
//signedParams.nonce = signInfo.nonce;
//signedParams.sign = signInfo.sign;


var op = {
    method: "POST",
    body: JSON.stringify(params),
    headers: {
        cookie: qtcookie,
        'Content-Type': 'application/json'
    }
};

op = JSON.stringify(op);
java.log(op);
data = java.ajax(base_url + content_url + `,${op}`);

try {
    data = JSON.parse(data);
    if (data.msg) {
        java.toast(data.msg);
    }
} catch (e) {}

content = data.content

if ((sources == "番茄" || sources == "七猫" || sources == "塔读") && getArguments(source.getVariable(), "fqpara") == "on" && tab == "小说") {
    var fqssionid = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "fqssionid") || "";
    content = content
        .replace(/ident="/g, 'ident="' + base_url)
        .replace(/book_id=/g, 'book_id=' + book_id + '&ssionid=' + fqssionid);
    if (device_type == "苹果") {
        content = paraForiOS(content, sources);
    } else {
        content = paraForAndroid(content, sources);
    }


}
data = JSON.stringify({
    content: content,
});

if (device_type == "安卓" && (tab == "短剧" || tab == "视频" || sources == '毒舌影视')) {
    data = {
        content: `【右上角刷新】开启播放(下一集请切换下一章刷新)\n播放直链：\n${content}`,
    };
    data = JSON.stringify(data);
    if (book.durChapterIndex === chapter.index) {
        let video_url = `${base_url}/online_video?book_id=${book_id}&source=${sources}&tab=${tab}`;
        if (sources == '毒舌影视') {
            video_url = content;
        };
        java.startBrowser(video_url, title);
        java.toast("正在加载视频...");
    }

}
data;

    }
};
op = JSON.stringify(op);
let varia = String(book.getVariable('custom'));

});
// varia = java.base64Encode(varia);
//java.log(`${base_url}/catalog?book_id=${book_id}&source=${sources}&tab=${tab}&variable=${varia},${op}`);

    `${base_url}/catalog?book_id=${book_id}&source=${sources}&tab=${tab}&variable=${varia},${op}`
);
let device, device_type;

    device = java.deviceID();
    device_type = "苹果";
} catch (e) {
    try {
        device = java.androidId();
        device_type = "安卓";
    } catch (e) {
        device = "";
        device_type = "安卓";
    }
}

if (tab == "小说") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 8;
    } else {
        book.type = 0;
    }
} else if (tab == "听书") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 32;
    } else {
        book.type = 1;
    }
} else if (tab == "漫画") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 64;
    } else {
        book.type = 2;
    }
} else if (tab == "短剧") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 8;
    } else {
        book.type = 3;
    }
} else {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 8;
    } else {
        book.type = 0;
    }
}
let qtcookie = cookie.getCookie(base_url);
let reading = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "reading");

if (book && book.order != 0 && reading == '1') {
    try {
        if (!data || !book.variable || !base_url || !qtcookie) {
            java.log('缺少必要参数');

            let parsedData;

                java.log('解析data数据失败:' + e);

                    java.log('解析book.variable失败:' + e);
